title: schefflera elliptica
intro: Schefflera elliptica, also known as the Umbrella Plant or Shingle Plant, is a popular, evergreen shrub native to the tropical forests of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schefflera elliptica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried or made into a tea infusion to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
